nonComplianceMessages.message: The resources being deployed are required to have specific tags and may require a value included in an allow list or match a specific pattern.
A resource group must have the Environment tag with a value included in the allow list.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Inherit Environment tag from the subscription if missing

nonComplianceMessages.message: A resource group must have the Environment tag with a value included in the allow list.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require Environment tag on resource groups with allowed values

nonComplianceMessages.message: A resource group must have the DataClassification tag with a value included in the allow list.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Inherit DataClassification tag from the resource group if missing

nonComplianceMessages.message: A resource group must have the DataClassification tag with a value included in the allow list.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require DataClassification tag on resource groups with allowed values

nonComplianceMessages.message: All resources must have the OpCo tag.
All resources must have the ResourceOwner tag with a value matching *@emcor.net.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require ResourceOwner tag on resources with a like matched value

nonComplianceMessages.message: All resources must have the LastTagReview tag with a value matching YYYY-MM-DD.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require LastTagReview tag on resources with a pattern matched value

nonComplianceMessages.message: All resources must have the BUID tag with the 3-digit ID as the value.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require BUID tag on resources with allowed values

nonComplianceMessages.message: The specified resource type must have the SNowInstanceID tag with a value included in the allow list.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require SNowInstanceID tag on specified resource types

nonComplianceMessages.message: The specified resource type must have the InternetFacing tag with a true/false value.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require InternetFacing tag on specified resource types with allowed values

nonComplianceMessages.message: The specified resource type must have the ExternalFQDN tag when InternetFacing is true.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require ExternalFQDN tag on specified resource types when InternetFacing tag is true

nonComplianceMessages.message: The specified resource type must have the MachineName tag that includes the NetBIOS name.
nonComplianceMessages.policyDefinitionReferenceId: Require MachineName tag on specified resource types
